append.description: {append} is used for creating or appending template variable arrays during the execution of a template.

assign.description: {assign} is used for assigning template variables during the execution of a template.

block.description: {block} is used to define a named area of template source for template inheritance.

break.description: {break} aborts the iteration of the array.

capture.description: {capture} is used to collect the output of the template between the tags into a variable instead of displaying it.

debug.description: {debug} dumps the debug console to the page.

extends.description: {extends} tags are used in child templates in template inheritance for extending parent templates.

foreach.description: {foreach} is used for looping over arrays of data.

function.description: {function} is used to create functions within a template and call them just like a plugin function.

include.description: {include} tags are used for including other templates in the current template.

literal.description: {literal} tags allow a block of data to be taken literally.

strip.description: Anything within {strip}{/strip} tags are stripped of the extra spaces or carriage returns.

capitalize.description: Capitalize the first letter of all words in a variable.

cat.description: Concatenate a value to the given variable.

count_characters.description: Count the number of characters in a variable.

count_paragraphs.description: Count the number of paragraphs in a variable.

count_sentences.description: Count the number of sentences in a variable.

count_words.description: Count the number of words in a variable.

date_format.description: Format a date and time into the given strftime() format.

default.description: Set a default value for a variable.

escape.description: Encode or escape a variable to html, url, single quotes, hex, hexentity, javascript and mail.

from_charset.description: Transcode a string from a given charset to the internal charset.

indent.description: Indent a string on each line, default is 4.

nl2br.description:
Convert all line breaks to html
tags.

regex_replace.description: Regular expression search and replace on a variable.

replace.description: Simple search and replace on a variable.

spacify.description: Insert a space between every character of a variable.

string_format.description: Format strings, such as decimal numbers using sprintf() syntax.

stripmodifier.description: Replace all spaces, newlines and tabs with a single space.

to_charset.description: Transcode a string from the internal charset to a given charset.

truncate.description: Truncate a variable to a character length, default is 80.

wordwrap.description: Wrap a string to a column width, default is 80.
